## 📖 Description
<!-- A clear and concise explanation of what this pull request is about and what it accomplishes. -->
Addresses Issue \#1166 by creating templates the team can use when opening issues or submitting pull requests.

---

## 📝 Additional Context
<!-- (Optional) Any extra information, screenshots, or background. -->
The use of the PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE subdirectory allows for the use of multiple templates by simply adding the templates to the folder and specifying which to use with query parameters. More information can be found in the above links.
